channel.title: LLM Timeline — Microsoft Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from Microsoft.

item.title: FrogBoss (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: FrogBoss License: open Type: model Base: Qwen3-32B.

item.title: Fara-7B (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: Fara-7B License: open Type: model "Fara-7B is Microsoft's first agentic small language model (SLM) designed specifically for computer use. With only 7 billion parameters, Fara-7B is an ultra-compact Computer Use Agent (CUA)...Current production baselines leverage Qwen 2.5-VL (7B)."

item.title: MAI-Image-1 (Microsoft)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: UserLM-8b (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: UserLM-8b License: open Type: model "we trained UserLM-8b to simulate the “user” role in conversation (by training it to predict user turns in a large corpus of conversations called WildChat)."

item.title: MAI-Voice-1 (Microsoft)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: MAI-1-preview (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: MAI-1-preview License: open Type: model MAI=Microsoft artificial intelligence. "MAI’s first foundation model trained end-to-end... MAI-1-preview is an in-house mixture-of-experts model, pre-trained and post-trained on ~15,000 NVIDIA H100 GPUs. This model is designed to provide powerful capabilities to consumers seeking to benefit from models that specialize in following instructions and providing helpful responses to everyday queries. We will be rolling MAI-1-preview out for certain text use cases within Copilot"

item.title: Phi-4-mini-flash-reasoning (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: Phi-4-mini-flash-reasoning License: open Type: model "Pre-training: 5T tokens; Reasoning training: 150B tokens" "At the core of Phi-4-mini-flash-reasoning is the newly introduced decoder-hybrid-decoder architecture, SambaY, whose central innovation is the Gated Memory Unit (GMU), a simple yet effective mechanism for sharing representations between layers. The architecture includes a self-decoder that combines Mamba (a State Space Model) and Sliding Window Attention (SWA), along with a single layer of full attention. The architecture also involves a cross-decoder that interleaves expensive cross-attention layers with the new, efficient GMUs. This new architecture with GMU modules drastically improves decoding efficiency, boosts long-context retrieval performance and enables the architecture to deliver exceptional performance across a wide range of tasks. "

item.title: Mu (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: Mu License: open Type: model "distillation from Microsoft’s Phi models...Mu is an efficient 330M encoder–decoder language model optimized for small-scale deployment, particularly on the NPUs on Copilot+ PCs. It follows a transformer encoder–decoder architecture"

item.title: Phi-4-Reasoning (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 14B License: open Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: Phi-4-Reasoning-plus (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 14B License: open Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: MAI-DS-R1 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 671B License: open Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: Phi-4-reasoning-plus (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: Phi-4-reasoning-plus License: open Type: model "Phi-4-reasoning-plus is a state-of-the-art open-weight reasoning model finetuned from Phi-4 using supervised fine-tuning on a dataset of chain-of-thought traces and reinforcement learning."

item.title: MAI-DS-R1 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: MAI-DS-R1 License: open Type: model DeepSeek-R1 base. "MAI-DS-R1, a new open weights DeepSeek R1 model variant... post-trained by the Microsoft AI team to improve its responsiveness on blocked topics and its risk profile, while maintaining its reasoning capabilities and competitive performance."

item.title: BitNet b1.58 2B4T (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: BitNet b1.58 2B4T License: open Type: model "the first open-source, native 1-bit Large Language Model (LLM) at the 2-billion parameter scale. Trained on a corpus of 4 trillion tokens"

item.title: Phi-4 Mini (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 3.8B License: open Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: Phi-4-Multimodal (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 5.6B License: open Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: Phi-4-multimodal (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: Phi-4-multimodal License: open Type: model "Training data: 5T tokens, 2.3M speech hours, and 1.1T image-text tokens" Announce: https://azure.microsoft.com/en-us/blog/empowering-innovation-the-next-generation-of-the-phi-family/

item.title: Phi-4-mini (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: Phi-4-mini License: open Type: model "Phi-4-mini’s training data includes a wide variety of sources, totaling 5 trillion tokens, and is a combination of publicly available documents filtered for quality, selected high-quality educational data, and code newly created synthetic, “textbook-like” data for the purpose of teaching math, coding, common sense reasoning, general knowledge of the world (e.g., science, daily activities, theory of mind, etc.) high quality chat format supervised data covering various topics to reflect human preferences" Announce: https://azure.microsoft.com/en-us/blog/empowering-innovation-the-next-generation-of-the-phi-family/

item.title: Phi-4 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: Phi-4 License: open Type: model Use unsloth: https://huggingface.co/unsloth/phi-4-GGUF & https://www.reddit.com/r/singularity/comments/1i0kso4/i_fixed_4_bugs_in_microsofts_opensource_phi4_model/

item.title: E2 TTS (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 335M License: closed Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: GRIN MoE (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: GRIN MoE License: open Type: model 16x3.8B "only 6.6B activate parameters". GRIN=GRadient-INformed. "GRIN MoE is pre-trained on 4T tokens as a Causal Language Model. The same training dataset has been used to train Phi-3 dense models"

item.title: Kosmos-2.5 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 1.3B License: open Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: phi-3.5-MoE (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: phi-3.5-MoE License: open Type: model

item.title: phi-3.5-mini (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: phi-3.5-mini License: open Type: model

item.title: Florence-2-B (base) (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 232M License: closed Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: Florence-2-L (large) (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 771M License: closed Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: SpreadsheetLLM (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: SpreadsheetLLM License: closed Type: model Notable finetune of GPT4-0125-preview "outperforming the vanilla approach by 25.6% in GPT4’s in-context learning setting"

item.title: Causal Axioms (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: Causal Axioms License: closed Type: model "the training dataset follows a specific structure, we develop a custom tokenizer. Alphanumeric node names are tokenized at a character level, while special terms such as ‘causes’, ‘Does’, ‘cause’, ‘Yes’, and ‘No’ are tokenized at the word level... Our training setup consists of around 175k instances of sequential chains with size of chains ranging from 3 to 6 nodes... All models are trained for 100 epochs. [LifeArchitect.ai estimate is 12 tokens per node x 6 nodes x 175,000 instances x 100 epochs = 1.26B tokens]" Based on GPT-2 arch.

item.title: Microsoft MAI-1 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 500B License: closed Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: YOCO (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: YOCO License: open Type: model With Tsingua. You Only Cache Once (YOCO). Long context "1M context length with near-perfect needle retrieval accuracy"

item.title: phi-3-mini 3.8B (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 3.8B License: open Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: phi-3-medium 14B (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 14B License: open Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: phi-3-small 7.4B (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 7.4B License: open Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: phi-3.5-mini (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 3.8B License: open Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: phi-3.5-Vision (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 4.2B License: open Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: Phi-3.5-MoE (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 60.8B License: open Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: WizardLM-2 8x22B (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 141B License: open Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: WizardLM-2 70B (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: closed Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: WizardLM-2 7B (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: TinyStories (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: TinyStories License: open Type: model Precursor to phi.

item.title: phi-3-medium (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: phi-3-medium License: open Type: model Preview only, benchmarks being investigated as of May/2024.

item.title: phi-3-mini (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: phi-3-mini License: open Type: model "phi3-mini can be quantized to 4-bits so that it only occupies ≈ 1.8GB of memory. We tested the quantized model by deploying phi-3-mini on iPhone 14 with A16 Bionic chip running natively on-device and fully offline achieving more than 12 tokens per second."

item.title: WizardLM-2-8x22B (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: WizardLM-2-8x22B License: open Type: model Base model = mistral-8x22b.

item.title: BitNet b1.58 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: BitNet b1.58 License: open Type: model

item.title: Phi-2 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 2.7B License: open Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: WaveCoder-DS-6.7B (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: WaveCoder-DS-6.7B License: closed Type: model To obtain WaveCoder models, We choose StarCoder-15B, CodeLLaMa (7B and 13B), DeepseekCoder-6.7B as the base model and fine-tune all the base model for 3 epochs

item.title: Transformers-Arithmetic (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: Transformers-Arithmetic License: closed Type: model Proving maths is not memorized. Uses GPT-2-style model. Sébastien Bubeck

item.title: Orca 2 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: Orca 2 License: partial Type: model Llama 2 13B (2T) -> Orca 2 (GPT-4 finetune). Still an imitation model, overhyped: The False Promise of Imitating Proprietary LLMs https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.15717

item.title: Phi-2 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: Phi-2 License: open Type: model https://twitter.com/SebastienBubeck/status/1724854157004190095

item.title: Florence-2 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: Florence-2 License: open Type: model VLM, Flamingo alt

item.title: Phi-1.5 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 1.3B License: open Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: Kosmos-2.5 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: Kosmos-2.5 License: closed Type: model

item.title: Phi-1.5 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: Phi-1.5 License: open Type: model Textbooks only. 30B-token dataset

item.title: WizardLM (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: WizardLM License: open Type: model Assume Llama-2 fine-tune. Outperforms text-davinci-003. May merge this entry with the Apr/2023 7B release

item.title: Multilingual-E5-large (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 560M License: open Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: Kosmos-2 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 1.6B License: open Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: WizardCoder-15.5B (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 15.5B License: open Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: Kosmos-2 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: Kosmos-2 License: open Type: model Proto-AGI. Multimodal large language model (MLLM). a multimodal large language model with grounding capability built upon KOSMOS-1

item.title: Phi-1 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: Phi-1 License: closed Type: model Code model. ‘breaking existing scaling laws by training a 1.3B-parameter model, which we call phi-1, for roughly 8 passes over 7B tokens (slightly over 50B total tokens seen) followed by finetuning on less than 200M tokens.’

item.title: Orca (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: Orca License: partial Type: model LLaMA -> Vicuna -> Orca (GPT-4 finetune). Still an imitation model, overhyped: The False Promise of Imitating Proprietary LLMs https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.15717

item.title: WizardLM (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: WizardLM License: open Type: model LLaMA 7B self-instructed fine-tune.

item.title: VALL-E X (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 700M License: closed Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: Kosmos-1 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 1.6B License: closed Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: Kosmos-1 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: Kosmos-1 License: closed Type: model Proto-AGI. Multimodal large language model (MLLM). Raven’s Progressive Matrices as real images, not digits as in testing of text-davinci-003 at https://lifearchitect.ai/ravens/

item.title: VALL-E (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 353M License: closed Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: FLAME (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: FLAME License: closed Type: model T5 for Excel formulas, very small 60M params, "We start from a dataset of 927M formulas" estimate 10x multiplier for 9B tokens

item.title: XY-LENTXL (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 2B License: closed Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: PACT (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: PACT License: open Type: model Trained on ~5TB data, 2GB model download. 'In general we see an improvement in model performance as we increase the number of training tokens. Interestingly, larger models did not necessarily result in better performance for robot navigation. Even though larger models consistently presented better loss values for action prediction on a static dataset, (Fig. 7 b), when it comes to real-time deployment the larger network capacity introduces inference delays that become a disadvantage and lead to earlier crashes. For example, while LiDAR perception measurements arrive to the vehicle every 0.077s (13Hz), the largest model of 24 layers takes on average 0.023s for inference with a RTX3090 GPU, roughly 40% longer the 3 layer model (0.016s). These time differences can amount to even larger performance gaps in small embedded systems, and further emphasize the importance of multiple downstream task architectures sharing a common representation branch for real-time robotics applications.'

item.title: BEIT-3 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 1.9B License: open Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: Z-Code++ (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: Z-Code++ License: closed Type: model abstractive text summarization, 710M, outperforms PaLM 540B. "Due to the limited computational resource, Z-Code++LARGE is trained with only 500B tokens instead of 1T tokens as that for mT5 training."

item.title: GODEL-XL (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: GODEL-XL License: open Type: model XL: GPT-3 175B in paper, GPT-J 2.7B released

item.title: DeBERTaV3large + KEAR (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 418M License: closed Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: T-NLRv5 XXL (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 5.4B License: closed Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: Florence (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 893M License: closed Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: DeBERTaV3 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: DeBERTaV3 License: open Type: model RoBERTa=162B token dataset.

item.title: Turing ULRv5 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 2.2B License: closed Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.description: Parameters: 135B License: closed Type: model AI model by Microsoft
